title: selliguea montana
intro: Selliguea montana, also known as the Mountain Fern or the Himalayan Polypody, is a type of evergreen fern native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Selliguea montana include the treatment of various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a tonic to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Selliguea montana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
